node.text: Tim struggled with his English lit class but did an analysis on a series that he thinks went okay.

node.text: Tim's favorite book is Harry Potter because it is immersive.

node.text: Tim's favorite fantasy film is Star Wars as it never gets old.

node.text: Tim sent John a pic that reminds John of practicing basketball outside when he was younger.

node.text: Tim enjoys fantasy books like Harry Potter and Game of Thrones.

node.text: Tim had a setback with a story he was writing based on his experiences in the UK.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "language") AND not(atom(content =~ "German")) on Observation 1 (Score: 0.96)
